name: Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients until well blended.
2. Form dough into 3/4-inch balls.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F.
4. Bake on a greased cookie sheet for about 12 minutes.
5. As the ball melts down during baking, the cookie develops the characteristic crinkled surface.
6. For an additional topping, place half a marshmallow cut side down on nearly baked cookies and return them to the oven for about 4 minutes before serving.
7. This recipe makes approximately 10 dozen 2-inch cookies.
8. If you plan to serve these with coffee, ensure it is consumed later as the cookies will be cooled first.
